prose.en: Where addresses are allocated dynamically, standardize dynamic address allocation lease information and the lease duration assigned to devices in accordance with {param:ia-3.3_prm_1} ; and

parameters.name: ia-3.3_prm_1
parameters.label: organization-defined lease information and lease duration

prose.en: Audit lease information when assigned to a device.

guidance.en: The Dynamic Host Configuration Protocol (DHCP) is an example of a means by which clients can dynamically receive network address assignments.

prose.en: dynamic address allocation lease information assigned to devices where addresses are allocated dynamically are standardized in accordance with {param:ia-03.03_odp.01};
dynamic address allocation lease duration assigned to devices where addresses are allocated dynamically are standardized in accordance with {param:ia-03.03_odp.02};
lease information is audited when assigned to a device.

objects.en: procedures addressing device identification and authentication
system configuration settings and associated documentation
evidence of lease information and lease duration assigned to devices
Organizational personnel with operational responsibilities for device identification and authentication
organizational personnel with information security responsibilities
Mechanisms supporting and/or implementing device identification and authentication capabilities
mechanisms supporting and/or implementing dynamic address allocation
mechanisms supporting and/or implanting auditing of lease information

guidelines.en: lease information to be employed to standardize dynamic address allocation for devices is defined;
lease duration to be employed to standardize dynamic address allocation for devices is defined;
